_comment: WorkEZ — Complete Image Alt Tags for ALL Dev Pages. Mapped to ACTUAL image filenames from dev.workez.in crawl.
_rules: Every MUST have an alt attribute
Decorative icons → alt="" (empty string, not missing)
Include primary keyword naturally — don't stuff
Format for centres: WorkEZ [Centre] — [what's shown] in [Area], [City]

global_elements._note: These appear on EVERY page — update once in the shared layout component
